overview: A cinematic, ultra-premium 3D portfolio for Tahsinullah Riyad (brand TR) — now with TR.AI, an integrated AI assistant featuring a chatbot, AI showcase, website builder, and floating widget. Built with React, Three.js, GSAP, and Framer Motion for a futuristic, immersive experience.
features: TR.AI chatbot section with real AI responses
Website Builder AI modal — describe a site and get a concept
Cinematic 3D portfolio sections (Hero, About, Skills, Projects, Social, Contact)
Dark futuristic aesthetic with GSAP and Framer Motion animations
